name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.21 Shopping trolley and recipe search cleanup
label: Shopping trolley and recipe search cleanup
release_notes: Cleans up the shopping trolley and inventory workflow, removes the duplicate recipe meal-category filter, and adds multi-select plus advanced Boolean-style recipe searching.
notes: Shopping completed items are now shown as In trolley, with fast session-only ticking and a simpler Save changes action.
Add trolley to inventory creates or updates inventory rows in one explicit action.
Expiry dates and pantry/removal reminders now belong on the Inventory tab per item.
Recipe Finder removes the overlapping Meal category filter and uses multi-select Course, Culture / style, Plate / dish style, Month / season and Dietary requirements filters.
Recipe Finder includes Include and Exclude search fields plus an optional Advanced search box with AND, OR, NOT and simple field syntax.
release_name: Shopping trolley and recipe search cleanup
